name: set_transform
description: Sets the position, rotation (euler angles), scale, or RectTransform properties (anchors, pivot, anchored_position, size_delta) of one or more GameObjects. Supports absolute (set to exact value) and relative (add to current value) modes. For multiple objects, separate names with commas. For RectTransform channels: 'anchors' uses x,y as anchorMin and z,w as anchorMax; 'pivot' uses x,y; 'anchored_position' uses x,y in pixels; 'size_delta' uses x,y as width,height in pixels.

game_objects.description: Name of a single GameObject, or a comma-separated list of names (e.g. 'Cube,Sphere,Enemy1').

channels.description: Which transform channels to apply. 'position_rotation' sets both position and rotation with the same x/y/z values. 'all' sets position, rotation, and scale. RectTransform channels: 'anchors' (x,y=anchorMin, z,w=anchorMax), 'pivot' (x,y), 'anchored_position' (x,y pixels), 'size_delta' (x=width, y=height pixels).

x.description: X value for the selected channel(s).

y.description: Y value for the selected channel(s).

z.description: Z value for the selected channel(s). Used as anchorMax.x for 'anchors' channel.

w.description: W value. Only used for 'anchors' channel as anchorMax.y.

mode.description: Whether to set the exact value ('absolute', default) or add to the current value ('relative').
